/usr/bin/clang++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/test/tcpTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/EventLoopThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/EventLoopThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/Connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/KVProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/HashLRUCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/LRUCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/KVService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/LevelDBStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/TaskQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcptest.dir/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o  -o tcptest   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/home/apirlstorm/leveldb/build  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/home/apirlstorm/leveldb/build -lpthread -levent -levent_pthreads /home/apirlstorm/leveldb/build/libleveldb.a
